attributes.description:
Sets the background color of the bottom sheet backdrop. This is the semi-transparent overlay that appears behind the bottom sheet when it is open.
CSS variable: --wm-bottomsheet-backdrop-background

Sets the background color of the bottom sheet component. This is the main background color that appears behind all bottom sheet content.
CSS variable: --wm-bottomsheet-background

Controls the border radius for rounded corners of the bottom sheet component. This makes the bottom sheet appear with rounded corners at the top.
CSS variable: --wm-bottomsheet-border-radius

Controls the border thickness of the bottom sheet component. This determines how thick the border around the bottom sheet appears.
CSS variable: --wm-bottomsheet-border-width

Sets the border color of the bottom sheet component. This determines what color the border around the bottom sheet appears in.
CSS variable: --wm-bottomsheet-border-color

Controls the left margin of the bottom sheet component. This creates spacing on the left side of the bottom sheet.
CSS variable: --wm-bottomsheet-margin-left

Controls the right margin of the bottom sheet component. This creates spacing on the right side of the bottom sheet.
CSS variable: --wm-bottomsheet-margin-right

Sets the background color of the bottom sheet drag handle. This is the background color that appears behind the drag handle area.
CSS variable: --wm-bottomsheet-handle-background

Controls the width of the drag handle icon in the bottom sheet. This determines how wide the drag handle icon appears.
CSS variable: --wm-bottomsheet-handle-icon-width

Controls the height of the drag handle icon in the bottom sheet. This determines how tall the drag handle icon appears.
CSS variable: --wm-bottomsheet-handle-icon-height

Sets the background color of the drag handle icon in the bottom sheet. This determines what color the drag handle icon appears in.
CSS variable: --wm-bottomsheet-handle-icon-background

Sets the top padding of the bottom sheet drag handle. This creates spacing at the top of the drag handle area.
CSS variable: --wm-bottomsheet-handle-padding-top

Sets the bottom padding of the bottom sheet drag handle. This creates spacing at the bottom of the drag handle area.
CSS variable: --wm-bottomsheet-handle-padding-bottom

Controls the border thickness of the bottom sheet drag handle. This determines how thick the border around the drag handle appears.
CSS variable: --wm-bottomsheet-handle-border-width

Sets the border color of the bottom sheet drag handle. This determines what color the border around the drag handle appears in.
CSS variable: --wm-bottomsheet-handle-border-color

Sets the top padding of the bottom sheet content area. This creates spacing at the top of the content.
CSS variable: --wm-bottomsheet-content-padding-top

Sets the bottom padding of the bottom sheet content area. This creates spacing at the bottom of the content.
CSS variable: --wm-bottomsheet-content-padding-bottom

Sets the left padding of the bottom sheet content area. This creates spacing on the left side of the content.
CSS variable: --wm-bottomsheet-content-padding-left

Sets the right padding of the bottom sheet content area. This creates spacing on the right side of the content.
CSS variable: --wm-bottomsheet-content-padding-right
